text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder got injured during training, so I
take her to the infirmary for treatment.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
choice_data_list: It's my fault for not paying closer attention.

Get some rest for now—there's always
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
choice_data_list: It's my fault for not paying closer attention.

Get some rest for now—there's always
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer! This wasn't your fault in any way.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The blame lies with me. I was too caught up in the
moment and lost track of my surroundings.
choice_data_list: Then we can both be more careful next time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I am an Umamusume, and you are my trainer. We
must compensate for one another's weaknesses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep a sharp lookout for Grass Wonder's safety
from there on out.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Very well. The fault is mine in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll play it safe for today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder returns to her room once the
treatment is complete.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I understand. I do worry that I might grow restless
not being able to run...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I can endure today so long as I know it's for a
better tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'll restore my energy for now so I won't miss a
step once treatment is over.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But in return... I ask that you come up with lots of
new training ideas in the meantime. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's recovery takes a while, but once
she gets back on the track, she shows more
motivation to train than before.
